title: Indexed Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donateToReserves on lending protocol
funds_lost: Over $6 million in ETH and USDC

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Unusual transaction patterns involving flash loans and protocol-specific functions
summary: Attackers exploited a flash loan to manipulate the price of tokens on Indexed Finance, then used the manipulated prices to drain liquidity pools. A guard could have detected and blocked the attack by monitoring for flash loans followed by calls to donateToReserves().
